command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [[ -n "$STATE_FILE" && -f "$STATE_FILE" ]]; then echo "State file: $(basename $STATE_FILE)" && jq '{workflow_name: .workflow_name, cursor: .cursor, owner_session_id: .owner_session_id, owner_agent_id: .owner_agent_id, steps: [.steps[] | {id: .id, status: .status}]}' "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "No state file found"; fi
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}], teams: .teams}' "$STATE_FILE"

ls -la .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && for d in .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/*/; do echo "=== $d ===" && cat "$d/assignment.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "" && cat "$d/context.json" 2>/dev/null && echo ""; done
STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$STATE_FILE"

echo "=== State files ===" && ls -la .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null && echo "" && echo "=== Main workflow state ===" && STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}], teams: .teams}' "$STATE_FILE"

for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do echo "=== $(basename $sf) ===" && jq '{workflow_name: .workflow_name, cursor: .cursor, owner_agent_id: .owner_agent_id, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}]}' "$sf" && echo ""; done

mkdir -p .wheel/history/stopped && STALE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_1470.json" && if [[ -f "$STALE" ]]; then cp "$STALE" ".wheel/history/stopped/$(basename "$STALE" .json)-stale-$(date -u +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).json" && rm -f "$STALE" && echo "Cleaned up stale state file"; fi

STATE_FILE=$(ls -t .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "=== $STATE_FILE ===" && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | {id, status}], teammates: .teams.["create-team"].teammates}' "$STATE_FILE"

ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo "state files" && for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf): $(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$sf") cursor=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$sf") owner=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id' "$sf")"; done
jq '.teams["create-team"].teammates' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "=== $w ===" && ls .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/ 2>/dev/null && echo ""; done
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do echo "=== $w ===" && cat ".wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/result.md" 2>/dev/null && echo ""; done

for sf in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$sf" ]] && echo "$(basename $sf):" && jq '{wf: .workflow_name, cursor: .cursor, owner: .owner_agent_id, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"]}' "$sf" && echo ""; done
echo "Proceeding — all workers already spawned and completed their tasks"

STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json" && jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammates: .teams["create-team"].teammates | keys}' "$STATE_FILE"
jq '.cursor' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json
echo "Trigger stop hook to process worker-2"
jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"]}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json
echo "advance worker-2"
jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json
echo "The workers are already spawned. Worker-2 is already running." && echo "Worker-3 is already running." && echo "All workers have completed their haiku tasks."
jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.815" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json" && WORKFLOW_FILE=$(jq -r '.workflow_file' "$STATE_FILE") && echo "WORKFLOW_FILE=$WORKFLOW_FILE" && engine_init "$WORKFLOW_FILE" "$STATE_FILE" && echo "--- engine init OK ---" && FAKE_HOOK_INPUT='{"session_id":"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a","agent_id":""}' && engine_handle_hook "stop" "$FAKE_HOOK_INPUT" 2>&1
jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.815" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/workflow.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/dispatch.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/lock.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/context.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/guard.sh" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/engine.sh" && STATE_FILE=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json" && WORKFLOW_FILE=$(jq -r '.workflow_file' "$STATE_FILE") && engine_init "$WORKFLOW_FILE" "$STATE_FILE" && FAKE_HOOK_INPUT='{"session_id":"f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a","agent_id":""}' && engine_handle_hook "stop" "$FAKE_HOOK_INPUT" 2>&1
jq '{cursor: .cursor, steps: [.steps[] | "\(.id):\(.status)"], teammate_count: (.teams["create-team"].teammates | length)}' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json
jq '.teams["create-team"].teammates' .wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json

PLUGIN_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.815" && export WHEEL_LIB_DIR="${PLUGIN_DIR}/lib" && source "${WHEEL_LIB_DIR}/state.sh" && SF=".wheel/state_f784fcd5-aa40-4362-b2f7-e4e870a2ca6a_1775768310_21184.json" && state_update_teammate_status "$SF" "create-team" "worker-1" "completed" && state_update_teammate_status "$SF" "create-team" "worker-2" "completed" && state_update_teammate_status "$SF" "create-team" "worker-3" "completed" && echo "All teammates marked completed"
